question: Chapters
feedback: Text does not list any main sections of the thesis. There is no mention of chapters or their titles, which is essential for providing an overview of the thesis structure.

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the content of any specific section of the thesis. It only presents the problem statement and motivation but lacks any indication of what each chapter will cover.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis cannot be easily understood from this text. While the problem and motivation are clearly stated, there is no indication of how the thesis will be organized into sections such as literature review, methodology, implementation, evaluation, etc.
